first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the model's assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
